items.text: numberServicesTrue counts the number of true values among inpGCASM, inpSAM, inpACASM, inpGFM, inpWxM, and inpFLS
items.fragment: numberServicesTrue counts the number of true values among inpGCASM, inpSAM, inpACASM, inpGFM, inpWxM, and inpFLS

items.text: when inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and (inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery) >= 1.0, then outDec = ACAS; otherwise outDec = GCAS

items.text: outDec = dynamic decision result when numberServicesTrue >= 2

items.text: outDec = static priority-based value when numberServicesTrue < 2
